title: BTS Adds Three Shows to Arirang World Tour Latin America Leg
detail: BTS added three additional concerts to the Latin American leg of the Arirang World Tour on April 8, 2026, scheduling one extra show each in Lima (Peru), Santiago (Chile), and Buenos Aires (Argentina). The additions reflect overwhelming demand after the original Latin America dates sold out within hours of the ARMY presale. The ARMY presale continued for these shows on April 8 at designated local times, with general sales to follow on April 10. The expansion brings the total tour date count to 85+ shows, reinforcing BTS's commitment to serving Latin American fans who had historically faced fewer tour opportunities than North American and Asian markets.

title: BTS Goyang Opening-Night Resale Tickets Hit 40× Face Value on Secondary Market
detail: With the Arirang World Tour opening day one day away, resale prices for BTS's Goyang Stadium shows (April 9–12) reached as high as $7,000+ on StubHub — approximately 40 times face value — according to Outlook India Respawn and Dojeon Media. The extraordinary secondary market prices reflected global demand from ARMY who missed out in official presales. Fan advocacy groups called on HYBE to implement stronger anti-scalping measures, including verified fan transferability and ID matching. The situation drew comparisons to Taylor Swift's Eras Tour resale prices in 2023, when some tickets also reached 10–30× face value.
